<?php /** * InconsistentSetupException * * PHP version 5 * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> * @copyright 2015 Jim Wigginton * @license http://www.opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.html MIT License * @link http://phpseclib.sourceforge.net */ namespace phpseclib3\Exception; /** * InconsistentSetupException * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> */ class InconsistentSetupException extends \RuntimeException { }
